recommendations.title: Borsalino and Co.
recommendations.overview: Marseille. Heaps of flowers and funeral wreaths... "A man who no longer defends his colors is no longer a man."

recommendations.title: The Outsider
recommendations.overview: Philippe Jordan is a policeman prone to advancing the cause of justice by any means necessary. On his agenda is a powerful drug cartel working out of Paris and Marseilles, with a drug lord who is essentially inaccessible -- but not immortal.

recommendations.title: Borsalino

recommendations.title: The Life of David Gale
recommendations.overview: A man against capital punishment is accused of murdering a fellow activist and is sent to death row.
